nasb.text: They almost destroyed me on earth, But as for me, I did not forsake Your precepts.

esv.text: They have almost made an end of me on earth, but I have not forsaken your precepts.

cnv.text: 他們幾乎把我從世上除滅了； 至於我，我卻沒有離棄你的訓詞。

ccb.text: 他们几乎置我于死地， 但我仍然没有背弃你的法则。

csbs.text: 他们几乎把我从这地上除灭； 但我却没有离弃你的训诫。
